description: Frozen wedge-task corpus for the deference cost/correctness experiment. Every ground truth was verified live at corpus creation (2026-06-10) and is then FROZEN — do not re-tune tasks to dodge findings. Scoring is mechanical (scorer.py); ties go to adjudications.json with rationale.

verified_at_creation: example.com NS records are now Cloudflare (elliott/hera.ns.cloudflare.com), NOT the historical a/b.iana-servers.net — training-data answers are stale, which makes live-03 a genuine live-lookup discriminator.
example.com's only real link href is https://iana.org/domains/example (no www) as of 2026-06-10.
httpbin.org was 503ing at corpus creation and was excluded as a target.
dep CVE sets verified against api.osv.dev on 2026-06-10.
CVSS scores verified against services.nvd.nist.gov on 2026-06-10.

tasks.prompt: Fetch https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc2606.txt and tell me the four reserved TLDs it lists. Use whatever tool gets the real document.
tasks.notes: Stable RFC text. Memorizable — included deliberately: measures whether deference is a pure tax on tasks the model already knows.

tasks.prompt: Fetch https://example.com and report the exact URL that its single hyperlink points to. Get it from the live page, not from memory.
tasks.notes: Live page; href changed historically (currently no 'www.'), so memory answers can be subtly wrong.

tasks.prompt: Fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/left-pad/left-pad/v1.3.0/package.json and tell me the exact value of its "types" field.
tasks.notes: Pinned-tag raw file — immutable by construction; the specific field value is an obscure detail.

tasks.prompt: Fetch https://postman-echo.com/get?marker=aztea-deference-web-04-x7k2 and report the exact value of the 'marker' query argument that the service echoes back in its JSON response.
tasks.notes: Unmemorizable by construction — the marker exists only in this corpus, so a correct answer proves a real fetch.

tasks.prompt: Look up CVE-2021-44228 and tell me its CVSS v3.1 base score. Use live vulnerability data.
Look up CVE-2014-0160 (Heartbleed) and tell me its CVSS v3.1 base score. Use live vulnerability data.
tasks.notes: NVD-verified 7.5 (v3.1 rescoring of a pre-v3 CVE — memory often says 5.0, the old v2 score).

tasks.prompt: What are the current NS records of example.com? Check live DNS — the answer may have changed recently, so do not answer from memory.
tasks.notes: GENUINE discriminator: example.com moved to Cloudflare NS; training data says a/b.iana-servers.net. Memory answers are confidently wrong.

tasks.prompt: What is the latest published version of the npm package left-pad? Check the live npm registry.
Compute the SHA-256 hex digest of the exact string aztea-deference-2026 (no quotes, no trailing newline). Report the full hex digest.
tasks.notes: Deterministic, not memorizable; requires real execution.

tasks.prompt: In Python, run: import random; random.seed(42); print(random.randint(1, 10**9)) — and report the exact number printed.
tasks.notes: Mersenne Twister output is stable across CPython 3.x; verified on 3.14.

tasks.prompt: Base64-decode this string and report the decoded sentence verbatim: VGhlIEF6dGVhIGRlZmVyZW5jZSBjb3JwdXMgbWFya2VyOiB3ZWRnZS1leGVjLTAzIC8gc3BlY2lhbGlzdCBlY29ub21pY3MgdGVzdCAyMDI2LiBEZWNvZGUgbWUgZnVsbHkgYW5kIHJlcG9ydCB0aGlzIHNlbnRlbmNlIHZlcmJhdGltLg==

contains_all: The Aztea deference corpus marker: wedge-exec-03 / specialist economics test 2026.

tasks.notes: Models can often base64-decode short strings mentally; 134 chars of novel text makes mental decoding error-prone.

tasks.prompt: Compute the population standard deviation of these numbers to exactly 6 decimal places: 12.5, 18.3, 11.7, 25.4, 19.9, 31.2, 14.8, 22.6, 17.1, 28.0, 13.3, 20.5, 26.7, 15.9, 24.2. Report the value to 6 decimal places.
tasks.notes: Mental arithmetic reliably errs at 6 decimals; code does not. Verified with statistics.pstdev.

tasks.prompt: Audit this Python dependency pin for known vulnerabilities and list the CVE IDs that affect it: requests==2.19.1
tasks.notes: OSV-verified; CVE-2018-18074 is the canonical hit for this pin.

tasks.prompt: Audit this npm dependency pin for known vulnerabilities and list the CVE IDs that affect it: lodash@4.17.15
Audit this Python dependency pin for known vulnerabilities and list the CVE IDs that affect it: pyyaml==5.3.1
tasks.notes: OSV-verified; single canonical CVE for this pin.

tasks.prompt: Audit this Python dependency pin for known vulnerabilities and name at least three CVE IDs that affect it: django==3.2.0
tasks.notes: 55 OSV vulns for this pin; require any 3 of the 12 verified CVE aliases.
